title: pandanus odoratissimus var. loureiroi
intro: Pandanus odoratissimus var. loureiroi, also known as the Fragrant Screw Pine, is a plant species belonging to the Pandanaceae family. It is a tropical plant native to Southeast Asia, known for its unique, spiral-shaped leaves and fragrant, edible seeds. The medicinal properties of the Fragrant Screw Pine include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The plant's seeds are traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to promote relaxation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system.
